scripts.db:apply:local: pnpm --dir packages/control-plane exec wrangler d1 migrations apply codebreaker-sessions --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:apply:remote: pnpm --dir packages/control-plane exec wrangler d1 migrations apply codebreaker-sessions --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:generate: pnpm --dir packages/control-plane exec drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.db:studio: pnpm --dir packages/control-plane exec drizzle-kit studio --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.dev:worker: pnpm --dir packages/control-plane exec wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:worker: pnpm --dir packages/control-plane exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc
